name: Web Resources Conformance Demo
summary: The runnable proof of the webresources pagination + delivery-transport contract (#1027, slice C). An in-demo CustomResourceClient returns a cold Consumable (nothing runs until subscribed), and the #061 pairing constraint is proven live: the offset strategy exposes a total (drives jump-to-page) while the cursor strategy omits it (write-stable, next/previous only). Concrete REST/GraphQL/WS clients + the customResources registry are impl in Frontier UI — only the contract crosses the seam.
description:
Concept

The runnable proof of the pagination + delivery-transport contract (#1027, slice C). An in-demo CustomResourceClient returns a cold Consumable (cold = nothing runs until subscribed).

Verified contract (#061)

The load-bearing pairing constraint runs live: offset/page expose a total (jump-to-page) while cursor omits it (write-stable, next()/previous() only) — the discriminated union made observable. Concrete clients + the registry are impl in Frontier UI — only the contract crosses the seam.
